description: Style Note Designed keeping in mind the aesthetics of the trendsetting youth of today, this bracelet from revv is simple, smart and stylish. Crafted from steel, its shine does not diminish with time, while its classic design and colour combination allow you to pair it with a wide range of ensembles. Product Details Steel round intertwined golden, copper and silver coloured bangle Materials and Care Steel Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust
